content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian's body and copy body have also stepped into the second level of the will world, and they have all condensed 1,000 will worlds, and they have all completed the transformation.

After the transformation of his will, Ye Tian found that Rift Wind Valley could not have an impact on his will at all.

In other words, Rift Valley can't help him anymore.

He could continue to cultivate the Will World, but he couldn't use Rift Valley.

"Forget it, it's time to be satisfied with such a big benefit this time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

During this period, Ye Tian claimed that his clone had been in the Traceless Territory, so the other Twelve Ancestors did not look for him, and he did not even attend any meetings.

But occasionally some important notices were summoned to him.

And the Twelve Ancestors also had an action, but Ye Tian did not participate.

For the True River Sword Ancestor and the others at the Extreme Realm level, they had been stranded in the Half-Step Eternal Realm for countless years, dreaming of breaking through to become an Eternal Realm existence.

Therefore, at any chance, they will participate in it and will not give up, what if they really break through?

this day.

Ye Tian disintegrated his copy body and clone by himself, and left the Traceless Territory in this way.

And the few treasures that were obtained from the Traceless Tower, after the True River Sword Ancestor and the others left, they also sent their clones out of the entrance, allowing the main body to take away the Void Divine Leaf and other treasures.

Therefore, these treasures were not lost.

Hall of Void Source.

The copied body and the doppelganger condense again, and the doppelganger cultivates the world of will, while the copied body comprehends the innate eternal rules, and the ontology is mainly to improve cultivation.

What Ye Tian wanted to do most at the moment was to raise his cultivation to the extreme of the Nine Levels Supreme, so that his strength would improve by leaps and bounds, and he would even be much stronger than the True River Sword Ancestor, maybe there was hope that he would be comparable to the existence of the Half-Step Eternal Realm of the Second Extreme Realm.

However, cultivating from the Ninefold Supreme to the Ninefold Supreme Extreme also requires countless resources and time, and the deeper the foundation, the longer it will naturally take.

Ten robbery dollars!

One hundred robbery dollars!

A thousand robbery dollars!

Before you know it, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

After such a long period of time, after Ye Tian had spent a lot of resources, he had finally raised his cultivation to the extreme of the Nine Folds Supreme.

At this time, he was only one step away from the half-step Eternal Realm.

If you want to break through from the Ninefold Supreme to the half-step Eternal Realm, you need the eternal rules to fit the body, and you don't need to fuse perfectly, if you can really fuse, it is the Eternal Realm.

But even if it fits the body, it is very difficult, and there is no way to break the shackles if the physical potential is not enough and the foundation is insufficient.

Only with enough potential and foundation can we break the shackles and be promoted to a half-step eternal realm with the help of the moment that fits the eternal rules.

It was not very difficult for Ye Tian to be promoted to the half-step Eternal Realm, however, he currently had a problem, that is, he had comprehended the innate eternal rules.

In other words, others only need to fit the eternal rules, and he needs to fit the innate eternal rules before he can break the shackles with the help of the power of fit and be promoted to the half-step eternal realm.

As a result, the difficulty has increased tenfold.

But once the breakthrough is made, the increase in strength will inevitably be the largest.

"If the ontology breaks through directly, the success rate is not very large, let's let the copy body break through again and again! Even if it fails, it can increase some experience, and the matter of breaking through the half-step eternal realm is not in a hurry!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian occasionally let the copy body make breakthroughs, but he failed every time at first.

After all, it was very difficult for the Nine Beings to ascend to the shackles of the Half-Step Eternal Realm, and many of the Half-Step Eternal Realms had used external objects when they first broke through, which had more or less damaged some foundations.

Ye Tian didn't want to use foreign objects, otherwise he still had the Void True Liquid in his hands, if he took the Void True Liquid, he would be able to break through to the half-step Eternal Realm one hundred percent.

But in that case, it will have a great impact on the impact on the eternal realm in the future.

Therefore, he didn't want to use the Void True Liquid to break through.

After many attempts, Ye Tian gradually mastered a lot of breakthrough experience, and finally succeeded in breaking through to the half-step Eternal Realm on this day.

Of course, this is just a breakthrough in the replication body, not a breakthrough in the body.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian disintegrated the copy body and began to break through again.

Gradually, Ye Tian could almost guarantee that he would make a breakthrough 100%.

-------------------

"Break through!"

Ye Tian's body began to choose to impact the half-step Eternal Realm.

I saw that his incomparably powerful body and the innate eternal rules had reached a certain fit in a short period of time, and the innate eternal rules seemed to be fused with the body on another level, but it was not really fused.

And the shackles in the dark begin to become easily impacted in this state of fit.

So, Ye Tian slammed the shackles with all his might.

Click!!!

The shackles were shattered, the bottleneck was broken, and Ye Tian officially stepped into the half-step Eternal Realm level.

At this time, his body began to transform, and even the power in his body began to transform into half-step eternal power.

Not only that, but Ye Tian's will has also improved a lot.

After a long time, Ye Tian's breakthrough was officially completed.

"Far more powerful than in the past!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At this moment, he can already be regarded as an extreme realm.

Because he has reached the half-step Eternal Realm, he has created a lot of Eternal Techniques, and he has also comprehended the innate eternal rules, which are no different from the Extreme Realm.

The only thing that is a little weak is that his half-step eternal power is still relatively weak.

But the half-step Eternal Realm does not pay attention to cultivation, so he can be regarded as a half-step Eternal Realm at the extreme realm level.

Ye Tian closed his eyes, sensed the state of his body, and immediately realized what level his current strength was about.

Three Extremes!

Before the breakthrough, he was between the First Pole Realm and the Second Pole Realm, or the weakest Polar Realm, but now he can be regarded as the top Three Pole Realm, only one step away from the Fourth Pole Realm.

As long as he stabilizes his realm and improves his half-step eternal power, his strength can officially step into the four-step realm and half-step eternal realm level.

The cultivation of the extreme realm is to enhance the innate eternal rules, and use the innate eternal rules to fit the body to stimulate the body to strengthen step by step, so as to reach a higher extreme realm.

With Ye Tian's current potential and level, he would hardly have any bottlenecks before he became the Seven Extremes Realm.

And the other half-step Eternal Realm, such as the True River Sword Ancestor, it was difficult to continue to improve at the level of the First Extreme Realm, because the basic ones he could improve were improved, and the rest were difficult to improve.

After breaking through to the half-step Eternal Realm, Ye Tian quickly discovered a problem, his cultivation consumption was too great, although he had obtained a huge amount of resources in the Primordial Sea, he couldn't withstand such consumption.

In addition to the condensation and replication of the body, resources also have to be consumed, and the amount of resources consumed by countless copies and condensation is also an astronomical amount.

According to his estimates, I am afraid that when he becomes a half-step eternal realm of the Five Extremes Realm, he will have no resources.
